meaning: n.传奇故事书,传奇文学adj.传说中的
examples: The hill is supposed to be the resting place of the legendary King Lud.
The Dutch battle against the sea is legendary.
Good evening and welcome to tonight's edition of Legendary Lives.
Philip Fisher, the legendary 89-year-old money manager (FORBES, Sept. 23, 1996), has held Motorola since 1957.
Once imperial cuisine, now the legendary duck dish is served at restaurants around the world.
